name: Bult
description: Bult — AI-assisted backend scaffolding tool for generating boilerplate code and API structures from specifications.

seo.title: Bult — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Bult: Bult — AI-assisted backend scaffolding tool for generating boilerplate code and API structures from specifications.

when_to_use: Automating repetitive developer tasks with AI agent workflows
Building workflow automations triggered by code events
Orchestrating multi-step AI pipelines for internal tooling
Reducing context-switching with AI-assisted task management

pros: Speeds up CRUD and API boilerplate
Reduces cold-start friction on new services
cons: Generated code still needs senior review
Not a replacement for design work
review.verdict: Handy for early project scaffolding, but real architecture still belongs to humans.
review.best_for: Solo devs and small teams bootstrapping new backend services fast
review.not_for: Mature codebases with established patterns and style guides
